titles.title: He's Got It All In Control

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He's got it all in control, He's got it all in control; He put that reassurance Way down in my soul, He's got it all in control.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I put my life in His hands, I put my life in His hands; The weary road I walk down I'm sure is in His plan, I put my life in His hands.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I put my life in His hands I put my life in His hands So every road I walk down I'm sure is in His plan I put my life in his hands.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He's got the Bride in control He's got the Bride in control He has put that Holy Ghost Way down in Her soul He's got the Bride in control.
